title: Tenant — private telemetry (demo)
description: Private-tenant view: data pushed via POST /api/v1/tenants/{key}/telemetry. Admin-only until the tenant auth proxy ships (issue #7).

list.name: satellite
list.label: Satellite
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT satellite FROM tenant_telemetry WHERE tenant = '$tenant'::uuid

list.name: field
list.label: Field
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT field FROM tenant_telemetry WHERE tenant = '$tenant'::uuid AND satellite = '$satellite'

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, field AS metric, value_num AS value FROM tenant_telemetry WHERE tenant = '$tenant'::uuid AND satellite = '$satellite' AND field IN ($field) AND value_num IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT satellite, field, count(*) AS points, max(ts) AS last FROM tenant_telemetry WHERE tenant = '$tenant'::uuid GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2
